patches_added.name: Disable Tumblr TV
patches_added.description: Removes the Tumblr TV tab from the bottom navigation bar.

patches_added.name: Disable ad-free banner
patches_added.description: Hides the banner with the frog that prompts you to buy Tumblr Ad-Free.

patches_added.name: Disable blog notification reminder
patches_added.description: Stops the reminder asking you to enable notifications for blogs you visit.

patches_added.name: Disable gift message popup
patches_added.description: Stops the popup that suggests buying TumblrMart items for other people.

patches_added.name: Disable in-app update
patches_added.description: Turns off the in-app update check and the update prompt.
